spanish: Aunque parezca extraño todos los seres de este planeta provenimos de las mismas formas de vida.
english: Although it may seem strange all beings on this planet come from the same forms of life.
explanation: Present subjunctive (parezca) after the concessive conjunction 'aunque' expressing uncertainty or possibility

spanish: Las estructuras homólogas son las que tienen un origen en común aunque cumplen diferentes funciones.
english: Homologous structures are those that have a common origin although they fulfill different functions.
explanation: Use of 'aunque' with indicative (cumplen) to express a factual contrast/concession

spanish: Comprender que todos los que lo habitamos formas diferentes que parezcamos somos parte de una gran familia.
english: Understanding that all of us who inhabit it however different we may appear are part of one big family.
explanation: Present subjunctive (parezcamos) in a relative clause after 'que' expressing uncertainty about the degree of difference
